description: Arcade provides a runtime layer for AI agents that handles user authorization, tool execution, and governance for actions across external systems. It offers prebuilt and custom MCP-based tools and infrastructure for deploying multi-user agents.
summary: arcade.dev exposes developer docs for an Arcade CLI and references a public API and MCP-related capabilities, but the publicly scrapeable docs did not reveal machine-readable API specs, concrete API/MCP endpoint URLs, or definitive auth mechanics beyond an Arcade API key used by the CLI.
